arts.ttl: Desperate star offers Celtic hope of £7m Christmas present that could unlock Tierney return – Parkhead news bulletin
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei is said to be 'desperate' to ditch Celtic for good - and that could be music to Brendan Rodgers' ears

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers outlines where Celtic plan to improve ahead of Motherwell clash
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of the clash, Rodgers made clear that he wants his Celtic side to be more ‘clinical’ against Motherwell to avoid a repeat scenario of their draw with Dundee United. Brendan Rodgers on Celtic’s Boxing Day clash vs Motherwell

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor shares hope Celtic will add 'a few new faces' in the January transfer window
arts.sum: “Like I said, come January we might have a few new faces in and that’ll push the group even further and the squad will get stronger. We’ll see what happens, but it’s always good to have new faces to push everyone as well.”

arts.ttl: 5 things every Celtic fan wants for Christmas - including Kieran Tierney in a pear tree
arts.sum: The Hoops have dominated Scottish football over the best part of the decade but the green-and-white faithful are hungry for more

arts.ttl: Alex Ferguson stuns Rangers, Celtic turn on the style and Hibs struck by tragedy - when Scottish football played on Christmas Day
arts.sum: It might be hard to believe these days, but Scottish football fixtures were once served up on Christmas Day

arts.ttl: Lennon Miller previews Celtic Park Boxing Day clash amid recent links with Parkhead move
arts.sum: Celtic have been linked with a move for Lennon Miller in recent weeks as the Bhoys look to strengthen the ranks once the January transfer window opens. The Bhoys take on Motherwell on Boxing Day, knowing a victory will take them 12 points clear of Rangers, who are in action during the evening kick-off against St Mirren in the Scottish Premiership .

arts.ttl: Officials and VAR for Celtic Scottish Premiership clashes against Motherwell and St Johnstone confirmed
arts.sum: Celtic round off 2024 with a Scottish Premiership double bill against Motherwell and St Johnstone on home soil before the New Year. Ahead of both clashes, Celtic have found out who will officiate their clashes against Motherwell and St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Preview: Celtic vs. Motherwell - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Scottish Premiership clash between Celtic and Motherwell, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Kansas City 2025 Home Kit Leaked - State Line x Hoops Design
arts.sum: The new Sporting KC 2025 home uniform features a unique design that combines the club's iconic 'State Line' and 'Hoops' designs.

arts.ttl: James McFadden says 'eyebrows were raised' with Celtic signing who has now proven people wrong
arts.sum: James McFadden hails Kasper Schmeichel signing at Celtic It’s a big reason why Celtic are dominating in Scotland, whether Ange Postecoglou is in the dugout or Brendan Rodgers has returned.
